column1: Children like to invent things and test (1) _____ .
Once my cousins made a simple telephone. (2) _____ made (3) _____ from cups and wire.
Francis found two good paper cups. (4) _____ tied (5) _____ to a long wire.
Caroline, his sister, talked softy into one cup. (6) _____ heard (7) _____ through the other cup.
Then Francis answered Caroline. (6) _____ heard (7) _____ very clearly. (10) _____ was fun.
